failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by omitting the required string item_id and replacing the provided product_id with integer 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 2, the agent had all required identifiers from the Coordinator plan: item_id="1096508426" and product_id="1808611083". The required tool schema also stated both item_id and product_id must be strings. Instead, the agent prepared ProductCatalogSearch with only {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and using an integer placeholder for product_id. The next step confirms this malformed invocation with a SchemaError. The error was not resolved later; the agent simply synthesized a failure response.
